name: Outback Caesar Dressing
directions: Combine all ingredients in a blender.
Blend on low for 20 seconds to incorporate oil.
Blend on high for 20 more seconds to mix thoroughly.
Place in covered container, and refrigerate.

name: Creamy Bacon Dressing
directions: Cut bacon into julienne strips, place in a skillet and saute' until crisp.
Remove bacon from pan, using a slotted spoon, and place on paper towels to absorb the grease.
Place the garlic and onion in hot bacon fat and saute' over high heat until soft.
Remove from the pan with slotted spoon.
In a large mixing bowl, combine sauteed bacon, garlic and onions with prepared mustard, Worcestershire sauce, Tabasco sauce, parsley, and honey.
Whisk all the ingredients together, using a wire whisk.
Add vinegar, mayonnaise, cream, and milk; whisk vigorously until blended.
Add ground pepper.
Serve on salad greens.

similar.name: Cooked Deli-Style Dressing for Potato Salad

name: Mint Dressing
directions: Combine sugar, water, and lemon juice in a small saucepan; bring to a boil, stirring occasionally.
Remove from heat.
Combine sugar mixture and mint leaves in container of an electric blender or food processor; process until leaves are finely chopped.
Cover and chill dressing 2 to 3 hours.
Serve dressing over fresh fruit.

name: Creamy Honey-Dijon Salad Dressing
directions: Process all ingredients in a blender until smooth, stopping to scrape down sides.
Chill at least 8 hours.
Serve.

name: Garlic-Yogurt Dressing
directions: Combine 1/2 cup nonfat plain yogurt, 1% milk, fresh lemon juice, honey, extra-virgin olive oil, dried oregano and minced garlic.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.

name: Ranch Dressing
directions: Puree all ingredients in blender.
Refrigerate in tightly sealed container.

name: Herb Dressing, low fat
directions: Run through blender.
If you use fresh herbs, refrigerate and use within 2 days.
If you use dried herbs, can be refrigerated for 5 days.

name: Cane Syrup Herb Vinaigrette
directions: In a bowl, whisk together cane syrup, mustard, garlic, balsamic vinegar, seasoning blend, basil, oregano, thyme, black pepper, and salt until blended.
Slowly whisk in olive oil until all of the oil is incorporated.

name: Creamy Vinaigrette Salad Dressing
directions: Mix all ingredients together well.
Chill and pour over your favorote salad!

name: Buttermilk Salad Dressing
directions: Mix all ingredients together.
Chill.
Pour over your favorite salad!

name: Sesame Seed Salad Dressing
directions: Combine ingredients in jar and shake well.
Refrigerate until ready to use.

name: Balsamic Vinaigrette
directions: Combine all ingredients in a jar; cover tightly, and shake vigorously.
Store in the refrigerator.

name: Aunt Isse's Salad Dressing
directions: In saucepan, combine sugar, flour, and salt.
Add remaining ingredients and mix.
Over medium heat, cook until thickened, stirring constantly.
Remove from heat and cool slightly.
Add butter, stirring until melted and blended.
Stir in Miracle Whip.
Use this dressing on your favorite macaroni or potato salad.
Chill salad until ready to serve.
(I make my macaroni salad with shell or elbow macaroni, a small amount of onion, grated carrot, chopped celery, and sometimes, like my aunt, I add sliced green olives.).

similar.name: Cooked Deli-Style Dressing for Potato Salad

name: Dill Caper Remoulade
directions: Mix all ingredients together well.
Enjoy.

name: Healthy Yogurt Salad Dressing
directions: Mix All ingredients in a bowl.
Refrigerate.

name: Herbes De Provence Dressing
directions: Combine the ingredients in a bowl and mix well.  Chill, covered for 2 hours to allow the flavors to blend.

name: Outback Steakhouse Bleu Cheese Dressing
directions: Mix all the ingredients together by hand in a large bowl until smooth and creamy.
Cover and chill in the fridge for 30 minutes (approximately) or until you are ready to use it.

name: Cooked Deli-Style Dressing for Potato Salad
directions: In a saucepan whisk together 2 eggs, sugar, cornstarch and salt.
Add in vinegar, half and half cream or milk, mustard and black pepper; bring to a simmer and cook whisking over medium-low heat heat until bubbly and thickened (about 4 minutes).
Stir in 2 tablespoons butter into the hot mixture until completely combined.
Cool slightly then refrigerate until completely cooled (about 2 hours).
Mix in the 1 cup mayonnaise (can use up to 1-1/2 cups, start with 1 cup and add in more if desired) until combined, then season with black pepper if desired.
*NOTE* if you are a mustard-lover you can add in a small amount more to taste after mixing in the mayonnaise (add in 1 teaspoon at a time as the mustard taste can overpower the dressing.

name: Tantalizing Blue Cheese Dressing
directions: Combine all ingredients in a jar.
Cover tightly and shake.
Chill.

similar.name: Cooked Deli-Style Dressing for Potato Salad

name: Hidden Valley Ranch Dressing Copycat
directions: Combine all ingredients.
Allow flavors to blend overnight.

name: Creamy Herb Dressing
directions: Whisk together buttermilk, mayonnaise, chopped fresh herbs, fresh lemon juice, salt and pepper, and optional garlic powder.
Chill 30 minutes.

name: Betty Crocker Spicy Herb Dressing
directions: Shake all ingredients in tightly covered jar.  Refrigerate for at least 4 hours before using and up to 1 week.
